creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
New port: irc/dircproxy-devel version 1.2.0-beta2 (1.2.0.b2)

Some files (like pkg-descr) taken from irc/dircproxy

What still remains questionable, if irc/dircproxy should be replaced
instaed. This is the continuation of dircproxy develompent, but marked
as unstable.

Project homepage: http://dircproxy.securiweb.net/

Tested with portlint & tinderbox.

Tinderbox log:
http://tinderbox.vx.sk/logs/6.2-FreeBSD-amd64/dircproxy-1.2.0.b2.log

.tar.gz file:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/irc-dircproxy-devel.tar.gz
